TranslationContext: This file contains Unit Names for the Deepwood Guardians Faction.

Translations.Comment: Tiefwald = deepwood, Hüter = guardians. Protectors of the ancient forest.
Standard German term for dryads. Tree spirits in elven form.
Tänzer = dancers. Swift and graceful forest warriors.
Forest archers. Masters of woodland archery.
Waldläufer = rangers. Elite scouts and hunters of the deep forest.
Fast cavalry of the forest. Riding forest creatures.
Majestic flying creature of the forest.
Hirsch = stag. Cavalry riding majestic forest stags.
Baumriese = tree giant. Living tree creature. Alternative: Treant (kept as fantasy term).
Dragon of the forest. Ancient guardian.
Noble leader of the forest folk.
Ancient and powerful tree creature. Wise forest spirit.
